app.name: Tab Zero
app.promise: Photograph a piece of mail and get it auto-filed as bill/todo/archive with the due date pulled out
app.targetUser: People with a physical-mail pile-up and bill-deadline anxiety
app.risk: Mechanic (document photo → extracted structured fields) sits close to the excluded PO-automation tool
app.riskMitigation: Build phase must actively defend the single-envelope, no-vendor-workflow framing rather than treat the distinction as settled
app.one_sentence_promise: Photograph a piece of mail and get it auto-filed as bill/todo/archive with the due date pulled out
